headline.purpose: Article titles and primary document headings.

title.purpose: Article rows and compact document hierarchy.

body.purpose: Long-form prose at a controlled measure.

ui.purpose: Controls, navigation, fields, and product copy.

label.purpose: Filters, statuses, metadata, and secondary actions.

shadows.name: ambient-row-lift
shadows.purpose: Web hover feedback for a selectable library row.

shadows.name: annotation-lift
shadows.purpose: Spatial notes and voice memo chips.

shadows.name: floating-control-lift
shadows.purpose: Fallback for floating native controls when Liquid Glass is unavailable.

motion.name: state-fast
motion.purpose: Pressed, selected, hover, and focus feedback.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: The single primary action within a local task group.
components.css: .ds-button-primary { height: 44px; border: 0; border-radius: 22px; padding: 0 22px; background: var(--accent, #1f5b8b); color: var(--on-accent, #faf9f5); font: 600 15px/1.4 -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, "Segoe UI", sans-serif; cursor: pointer; transition: background 150ms cubic-bezier(.22,1,.36,1), opacity 150ms cubic-bezier(.22,1,.36,1); } .ds-button-primary:hover { background: var(--accent-strong, #173f6e); } .ds-button-primary:focus-visible { outline: 3px solid var(--mist, #e8eff3); outline-offset: 2px; } .ds-button-primary:active { opacity: .82; }

components.name: Secondary Button
components.description: A restrained supporting action on an opaque leaf surface.
components.css: .ds-button-secondary { height: 44px; border: 1px solid var(--hairline, #d9d9d3); border-radius: 22px; padding: 0 22px; background: var(--surface, #fcfbf7); color: var(--accent, #1f5b8b); font: 600 15px/1.4 -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, "Segoe UI", sans-serif; cursor: pointer; transition: background 150ms cubic-bezier(.22,1,.36,1), border-color 150ms cubic-bezier(.22,1,.36,1); } .ds-button-secondary:hover { background: var(--mist, #e8eff3); border-color: var(--link-underline, #a7c5d8); } .ds-button-secondary:focus-visible { outline: 3px solid var(--mist, #e8eff3); outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Capture Field
components.description: The primary URL capture field for saving research material.
components.css: .ds-capture-field { box-sizing: border-box; width: 100%; height: 44px; border: 1px solid var(--hairline, #d9d9d3); border-radius: 22px; padding: 0 16px; background: var(--surface, #fcfbf7); color: var(--ink, #172a3e); font: 400 15px/1.4 -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, "Segoe UI", sans-serif; outline: none; transition: border-color 150ms cubic-bezier(.22,1,.36,1), box-shadow 150ms cubic-bezier(.22,1,.36,1); } .ds-capture-field::placeholder { color: var(--ink-faint, #7b8995); } .ds-capture-field:focus { border-color: var(--link, #2f6f9d); box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px var(--mist, #e8eff3); }

components.name: Filter Chip
components.description: A compact filter with a clear selected state.
components.css: .ds-filter-chip { border: 1px solid var(--hairline, #d9d9d3); border-radius: 999px; padding: 6px 14px; background: var(--surface, #fcfbf7); color: var(--ink-secondary, #526576); font: 600 13px/1.38 -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, "Segoe UI", sans-serif; cursor: pointer; transition: color 150ms cubic-bezier(.22,1,.36,1), background 150ms cubic-bezier(.22,1,.36,1), border-color 150ms cubic-bezier(.22,1,.36,1); } .ds-filter-chip:hover { border-color: var(--link-underline, #a7c5d8); } .ds-filter-chip[aria-pressed="true"] { border-color: var(--accent, #1f5b8b); background: var(--accent, #1f5b8b); color: var(--on-accent, #faf9f5); } .ds-filter-chip:focus-visible { outline: 3px solid var(--mist, #e8eff3); outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Article Row
components.description: An open typographic library row separated by a hairline, optimized for scanning and return.
components.css: .ds-article-row { position: relative; border-bottom: 1px solid var(--hairline, #d9d9d3); padding: 19px 4px; background: transparent; color: var(--ink, #172a3e); } .ds-article-row h3 { margin: 0; font: 600 20px/1.35 Georgia, "Iowan Old Style", serif; } .ds-article-row p { margin: 6px 0 0; max-width: 72ch; color: var(--ink-secondary, #526576); font: 400 14px/1.5 -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, "Segoe UI", sans-serif; } .ds-article-row span { border-radius: 999px; padding: 3px 9px; background: var(--mist, #e8eff3); color: var(--accent, #1f5b8b); font: 600 11px/1.3 -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, "Segoe UI", sans-serif; }

components.name: Reader Navigation
components.description: A quiet sticky bar that keeps reading actions available without becoming a second header.
components.css: .ds-reader-nav { display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr auto 1fr; align-items: center; min-height: 58px; padding: 0 16px; background: rgba(245,243,238,.92); backdrop-filter: blur(6px); color: var(--ink, #172a3e); font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, "Segoe UI", sans-serif; } .ds-reader-nav strong { max-width: 42ch; overflow: hidden; text-overflow: ellipsis; white-space: nowrap; font-size: 13.5px; text-align: center; } .ds-reader-nav button { justify-self: start; border: 0; background: transparent; color: var(--accent, #1f5b8b); font-weight: 600; cursor: pointer; } .ds-reader-nav button:last-child { justify-self: end; width: 36px; height: 36px; border: 1px solid var(--hairline, #d9d9d3); border-radius: 50%; background: var(--surface, #fcfbf7); } .ds-reader-nav svg { width: 16px; fill: none; stroke: currentColor; stroke-width: 1.8; stroke-linecap: round; } .ds-reader-nav button:focus-visible { outline: 3px solid var(--mist, #e8eff3); outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Annotation Note
components.description: A spatial note that remains visually attached to its source.
components.html: <aside class="ds-annotation-note">Compare this section with the earlier definition.</aside>
components.css: .ds-annotation-note { max-width: 230px; border: 1px solid var(--wash, #a7c5d8); border-radius: 10px 10px 10px 2px; padding: 7px 10px; background: var(--mist, #e8eff3); color: var(--ink, #172a3e); box-shadow: 0 2px 6px rgba(27,79,138,.18); font: 400 13.5px/19px -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, "Segoe UI", sans-serif; }

narrative.overview: Inkwell should feel like opening a private library that is always arranged for one serious reader. The atmosphere is calm, mature, and quietly personal. Apple Books is the primary quality anchor: native behavior, confident typography, low interface noise, and controls that feel available without competing with the text.
keyCharacteristics: Reading-first hierarchy with controls receding at rest.
Quiet Shelves library rows that sit directly on the paper canvas.
Progressive Add capture and a dismissable iPad annotation rail.
Restrained color, with brush blue reserved for action and selection.
Native iOS and iPadOS behavior where the platform offers a superior control.
Serif content paired with system UI typography.
Subtle tonal layering, with shadows reserved for true floating elements.
Cross-device consistency without forcing identical layouts.

rules.name: The One Brush Rule
rules.body: Brush blue is used for primary action, selection, focus, and progress only. If a blue element does not communicate one of those roles, remove the blue.

rules.name: The Quiet Night Rule
rules.body: Dark appearance uses neutral charcoal surfaces and lifted blue accents. Pure black, blue-black canvases, and neon accents are forbidden.

rules.name: The Two Voices Rule
rules.body: Serif communicates source material and intellectual structure. System sans communicates the application.

rules.name: The Reading Measure Rule
rules.body: Prose measure and line height are functional tokens. Do not widen article text to fill available screen space.

rules.name: The Glass Boundary Rule
rules.body: Native Liquid Glass is for navigation, toolbars, and compact transient controls that float above the task. Article surfaces, library rows, notes, forms, and content containers remain opaque.

rules.name: The Flat-at-Rest Rule
rules.body: Resting content surfaces do not cast shadows. A shadow must explain hover, spatial annotation, or transient elevation.

dos: Do make reading content the strongest visual element on every article screen.
Do use native iOS and iPadOS Liquid Glass for floating navigation and tool controls when the platform API is available.
Do preserve opaque paper-like surfaces beneath prose, notes, rows, and forms.
Do use brush blue only for action, selection, focus, and progress.
Do support system appearance, Dynamic Type where practical, VoiceOver, keyboard navigation on web, visible focus states, and reduced motion.
Do adapt layout by device while preserving one component vocabulary.
Do use state motion between 150ms and 250ms with an ease-out curve.
donts: Don't resemble a children's journal, scrapbook, diary, or gamified note-taking app.
Don't use playful stationery motifs, stickers, novelty illustrations, bubbly controls, rainbow palettes, handwriting effects, or celebratory animation.
Don't turn reading into a generic productivity dashboard of metrics, badges, and card grids.
Don't use Liquid Glass for article containers, library rows, notes, input fields, or decorative background panels.
Don't use pure black, pure white as a new token, neon color, gradient text, or decorative gradients.
Don't use colored side-stripe borders thicker than 1px on cards, callouts, list items, or alerts.
Don't use display serif for controls, labels, data, or form text.
Don't animate layout properties, use bounce or elastic easing, or add motion that does not communicate state.
Don't invent unfamiliar controls when a native platform affordance already solves the task.
